name: retrostrap-boards
description: Retrostrap Boards, the community forum, built with retrostrap. Server-rendered, own your data.
comment: hono powers the Boards request layer (on the DynamoDB stack); @node-rs/argon2 is the production password hasher, wired in at the Lambda entry (handler.js -> auth-argon2.js) so the tested core in src/ stays free of a native dep and CI needs no service deps.
